description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python package that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have three jobs: lint, unit-tests, and integration-tests, all running on ubuntu-latest. The lint job should check out the code, set up Python 3.11, install ruff, and run it on the docker and tests directories. The unit-tests job should run unit tests on multiple Python versions (3.7 to 3.11) with a matrix strategy, installing dependencies and running tests with py.test. The integration-tests job should run integration tests on different variants with a matrix strategy, making the variant with Docker.
